headline: Minesweeper Tactics in the Strait of Hormuz
lede: Navigate the Strait of Hormuz in this browser-based logic puzzle. The game transforms maritime tension into a minimalist test of precision and caution.

headline: Why Modern JavaScript Bundles Continue to Bloat
lede: The dependency chain is growing heavier, driven by legacy support and a habit of over-abstraction. It is time to prune the atomized packages and return to native platform features.

headline: Correcting Integer Sign-Extension in KVM Selftests
lede: A persistent system crash during core migration led to a discovery in kernel arithmetic. Casting variables to unsigned types resolved the bit-shift error and finalized the contribution.

headline: Parsing Two Decades of Thermal Receipt History
lede: The author successfully converted eleven thousand weathered receipt images into structured data. This AI-orchestrated pipeline captures the evolution of consumer spending habits through decades of paper.

headline: Investigating Deterministic Silence in Frontier Models
lede: Access to experimental logs confirms a sudden communication breakdown between high-level agents. The cause appears rooted in token-optimization layers rather than emergent machine behavior.

headline: Tinybox Delivers High-Performance Deep Learning Compute
lede: The Tinybox system streamlines the deep learning stack for professional workloads. By simplifying the underlying tensor operations, the hardware targets high-speed inference without the traditional abstraction layer.

headline: The Hidden Value of Slow-Burn Software Development
lede: In an era of rapid iteration, the friction of careful decision-making is often discarded. True institutional trust and system reliability require the patience to grow rather than just build.
pullquote: Institutional trust cannot be manufactured through the rapid removal of friction

headline: Retrofitting Chest Freezers for Maximum Thermal Efficiency
lede: Vertical refrigerators lose energy every time the door swings wide. Converting a chest freezer into a temperature-controlled cold store slashes daily consumption to a fraction of standard benchmarks.

headline: Professional Editing Engines Running on WebGPU
lede: Web-based video suites now attempt to mimic native desktop performance through WASM and GPU acceleration. However, inconsistent driver support and sandboxing remain significant obstacles for mission-critical workflows.

headline: ESA Reconnects with Lost Deep-Space Craft
lede: Against the backdrop of total signal loss, ground control has successfully established contact with the wayward mission. This recovery underscores the endurance of long-range communication architecture in the void.
